links.text: Technical Documentation: What is Apache Kafka?

servicePlans.name: reference
servicePlans.description: Get access to an advertised Kafka cluster.

advertisement.description: The unique identifier of the advertisement to create a service reference for

validity.description: The desired lifetime of the certificate

cert_format.description: The desired output format for the certificate

key_format.description: The desired output format for the private key

key_size.description: The number of bits the private key shall have

key_alg.description: The encryption algorithm to use for encrypting the private key

secret.description: The secret to use for encrypting the private key

credential-type.description: The type of credentials to create. By default, only X.509 certificates are created, but passwords are no longer included in bindings.

binding_format.description: The format of the binding credentials. Compact format supresses advertised resources and quota in binding credentials.

validity.description: The desired lifetime of the certificate

cert_format.description: The desired output format for the certificate

key_format.description: The desired output format for the private key

key_size.description: The number of bits the private key shall have

key_alg.description: The encryption algorithm to use for encrypting the private key

secret.description: The secret to use for encrypting the private key

servicePlans.name: standard
servicePlans.description: Dedicated Kafka cluster with variable size.

dynatrace_enabled.description: Flag to enable/disable Dynatrace monitoring for the service

dynatrace_environment_id.description: Identifier for the Dynatrace environment the service will report to

dynatrace_api_token.description: API token for the Dynatrace environment the service will report to

dynatrace_api_url.description: API URL for the Dynatrace environment the service will report to

number_of_brokers.description: Number of Kafka brokers. Valid range is between 3 and 100 brokers.

disk_per_broker.description: Disk size in GBs for each broker in the cluster. Valid input format is <size-in-GBs>G.

cores_per_broker.description: Number of cores for each broker

message_max_bytes.description: The largest record batch size allowed by Kafka. Valid range is 1 to 10 MB with format <size-in-unit>[unit], e.g. 1000k.

auto_create_topics_enable.description: Enable auto creation of topics on the Kafka cluster

delete_topic_enable.description: Enable deletion of topics on the Kafka cluster

topics.description: Comma-separated list of names or specifications of topics to create intially

min_insync_replicas.description: The minimum number of replicas that must acknowledge a write

log_retention_hours.description: How long messages should be retained in hours

public_ip.description: Flag to enable/disable a public endpoint for the cluster

allow_access.description: IP addresses, CIDR ranges and domains to give access to the public endpoint

enable_kafka_connect.description: Flag to enable/disable Kafka Connect for the cluster

remote_log_storage_system_enable.description: Flag to enable remote ("tiered") storage for the cluster

log_local_retention.description: How long messages should be retained locally. Older messages are transferred to remote storage. Format <int>[dhms], e.g. 3600000, 7d, 24h, 30m, 3600s. Value without unit is interpreted as milliseconds.

log_local_retention_bytes.description: The maximum size of log segments to be retained locally. Excess data is transferred to remote storage. Format <int>[kMGT], e.g. 1024, 256k, 100M, 42G, 1T. Value without unit is interpreted as bytes.

stack.description: Resource manager used to provision clusters

broker_bind_mode.description: Mode used to provision service bindings, either sync or async

enable_global_advertising.description: Flag to enable/disable global advertising for the cluster

connectors.description: List of connectors to install on the cluster

dynatrace_enabled.description: Flag to enable/disable Dynatrace monitoring for the service

dynatrace_environment_id.description: Identifier for the Dynatrace environment the service will report to

dynatrace_api_token.description: API token for the Dynatrace environment the service will report to

dynatrace_api_url.description: API URL for the Dynatrace environment the service will report to

broker_bind_mode.description: Mode used to provision service bindings, either sync or async

enable_global_advertising.description: Flag to enable/disable global advertising for the service

suspend_basic_auth_shutdown.description: Flag to postpone the deactivation of basic authentication for 24 hours

connectors.description: List of connectors to install on the cluster

key_format.description: The desired output format for the private key
